input.title: LewLM Product Launch Brief

settings.subtitle: Spring launch overview for cross-functional stakeholders.

input.summary: This brief packages launch status, rollout themes, and follow-up ownership into a branded document artifact.
key_points: Keep API and CLI rollout dates aligned.
Use the same launch messaging across docs and support channels.
Track onboarding questions in the first-week operations review.

sections.heading: Launch Priorities
paragraphs: The initial release focuses on a stable local-first workflow across chat, tool execution, and document transforms.
bullets: Validate operator guidance for customer pilots.
sections.callout_body: Platform operations owns the final go-live checklist.

sections.heading: Customer Readiness
paragraphs: Support and product teams will use the same release brief so external messaging stays consistent.
bullets: Share the migration FAQ with the customer success team.
